frame_analyses.description: Setup phase showing laparoscopic trainer with instruments
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Two graspers and suture package visible

frame_analyses.description: Hands manipulating 2-0 braided suture package outside trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper suture identification - 2-0 Vicryl with taper needle

frame_analyses.description: Loading needle onto right instrument, good needle grasp position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle grasped at appropriate 2/3 position from tip

frame_analyses.description: Needle entering Penrose drain at first mark location
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean perpendicular needle entry through mark

frame_analyses.description: Completing suture passage through both marks on drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good visualization of suture through both marked locations

frame_analyses.description: Beginning extracorporeal knot tying with hands outside trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper technique bringing suture ends outside for knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Forming extracorporeal knot with multiple throws
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good hand positioning for secure knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Using knot pusher to advance knot down to tissue
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper knot pusher technique with controlled advancement

frame_analyses.description: Continuing to push knot down with appropriate tension
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining tension on both suture ends during knot advancement

frame_analyses.description: Final result showing completed suture with knot at tissue level
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears well-seated, drain approximated without gap

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed task with suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with appropriate suture tail length

penalties.description: Entry point appears within 1mm of first mark
Exit point appears within 1mm of second mark

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of most technical elements. Suture placement accuracy estimated from available camera angles. Timing well-observed throughout task phases.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements for suture deviation due to camera angle limitations
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient completion time of 81 seconds. Strong technical execution across all phases with minimal penalties for slight suture placement deviation.
strengths: Rapid and efficient suture placement (18 seconds)
Proper knot pusher usage with good tension control
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise needle entry exactly at marks to eliminate deviation penalties
Consider slight reduction in needle loading time to reach expert benchmark
